name: AMPK signaling
notes: Energy-sensing kinase; activated by low ATP/high AMP. Counter-balances mTOR. Implicated in autism mitochondrial subtype and as metformin's primary target.

name: IGF-1 / insulin signaling
notes: Growth-factor axis. Low IGF-1 in autism cohorts; IGF-1 trials in Rett (MECP2) and Phelan-McDermid (SHANK3) ongoing.

name: FOXO transcription factors
notes: Stress-response and longevity TFs. Regulate autophagy, antioxidant defense, synaptic plasticity. Counter-regulated by IGF-1/AKT.

name: SIRTUIN / NAD+ metabolism
notes: NAD+-dependent deacetylases. SIRT1/3 implicated in mitochondrial biogenesis and neuronal protection. NAD+ levels reportedly low in autism subsets.

name: PI3K/AKT signaling
notes: Central growth/survival kinase axis. Hyperactivation in PTEN/TSC syndromic autism. Drives mTOR upstream.

name: HPA axis dysregulation
notes: Hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis. Elevated baseline cortisol and blunted reactivity reported in autism. Linked to maternal stress transmission and vagal tone.

name: Mast cell activation
notes: MCAS overlaps with autism in subset; histamine/tryptase release drives BBB permeability and neuroinflammation.

name: Endocannabinoid system
notes: CB1/CB2 modulation of glutamate, GABA, microglial activation. Anandamide low in some autism cohorts; CBD trials positive.

name: Vagus nerve / autonomic regulation
notes: Vagal tone regulates inflammation (cholinergic anti-inflammatory pathway), gut-brain signaling, social engagement (polyvagal theory). Reduced HRV variability reported in autism.

name: Calcium / glutamate-NMDA homeostasis
notes: Excitotoxicity hypothesis; NMDA hyperactivation; calcium dysregulation in mitochondria. Targeted by memantine, riluzole, magnesium.
